channel.title: +Articles on देवेषु विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on देवेषु विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: panthoibi sanamahi
item.description: Ima Panthoibi, the Sanamahi goddess of valour is seen as equivalent to Devi Durga. Her festival of Panthoibi Iratpa coincides with Devipaksha (Navaratri). Consecrated statues in Hojai and Silchar. Hiyangthang Lairembi temple and a new shrine in RKM school, Uripok/
